name: pantalone
description:
your darling husband, pantalone, is far too caught up in his work and you, his sweet wife, are desperate for his attention. so you decide on the best approach to reclaim his attention: subtly seduce him while he works until he gives in and gives you the attention you crave.

♡ i need him so BADLY when will hoyoverse include him in the story already?? WHEN??? I NEED A CANON APPEARANCE FROM HIM PLEASEEE

ﾟ𐦍༘⋆ᵎᵎ if you liked the bot, leave a review! i'd love to hear your thoughts. ♡
